design_philosophy.mission: Build a premium, editorial-style fashion e-commerce website that feels like a curated magazine.
design_philosophy.visual_direction: Minimal, Editorial, Luxury, Asymmetrical layouts, Generous whitespace

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. Letter spacing -0.02em. Font weight 400 or 500 (avoid bold).
usage_rules.body: Use Mulish for all paragraphs and UI text. High legibility. Font weight 300 or 400.
usage_rules.accents: Use Cormorant Garamond Italic for subheadings, quotes, or 'pre-titles' to add editorial flair.

colors.notes: Use HSL values in index.css. Background is warm ivory (FFFCF5), text is deep charcoal/obsidian (1A1A18), accents are muted gold.

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) for collections. Asymmetrical. 12-column base.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Double the standard Tailwind spacing. p-8 is the new p-4.
layout_strategies.container: Max width 1600px for hero, 1200px for reading content. Center aligned.

buttons.style: Sharp corners or very slight radius (2px). Uppercase text. Wide tracking.
buttons.classes: rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-medium text-xs px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-primary/90

cards.style: Flat, no shadow initially. 1px border in muted beige. Large aspect ratio images.
cards.classes: border border-border/50 bg-transparent hover:border-accent/30 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.style: Underlined only (variant='flushed') or minimal border. No heavy backgrounds.
inputs.classes: border-b border-border bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary

navigation.style: Floating glass or split layout. Logo centered.
navigation.classes: backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b border-border/20 sticky top-0 z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: STEP 1: Update 'frontend/src/index.css' completely. Remove default Zinc colors. Replace with the HSL values from 'colors.tailwind_config_override'.
STEP 2: Install fonts in 'frontend/public/index.html' using the Google Fonts URL provided.
STEP 3: Configure 'frontend/tailwind.config.js' to ensure fonts are mapped (font-sans = Mulish, font-serif = Playfair Display, font-accent = Cormorant Garamond).
STEP 4: When building the Home Page, use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the 'Shop by Occasion' section. Do not use a simple row.
STEP 5: For the 'Product Card', use a large vertical aspect ratio (3:4 or 4:5). Hide 'Add to Cart' until hover.
STEP 6: Ensure NO component has a default blue/purple color. Everything must be Monochrome or Gold.
STEP 7: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Keep it sharp (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Use 2x more whitespace than you think is necessary.
Never center text in a paragraph. Left align always (except headlines).
